calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Connie Chan for and with Hue Phong.

The Court stated that the problem is that Mr. Phong has a birth certificate, that one of the pre-requisites of having the Court issue an order establishing fact of birth is when there is no access to a birth certificate or proof of birth, and that it is not clear that this falls into the statute. Ms. Chan stated that problem is that SCIS is refusing to correct Mr. Phong's certificate of naturalization and that when he was sworn in the Immigration Officer refused to put his correct date of birth on the naturalization record. The Court stated that it is very sympathetic to Mr. Phong's problem, but it can not issue an order to a government agency to correct their records. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth is denied.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
